title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 04 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 04 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 04 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/12/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 1.14 % today, the main contract closed at 958. The steel mills are not active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Tangshan port deal 985 yuan/mt.
